arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool star makes important decision on his future
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has reportedly made the decision to stay at Anfield and continue to fight for his future with his current club. The Uruguay international has had his issues getting into the Liverpool team and staying there on a regular basis, having not always been the most consistent and reliable performer.
